utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know when we move in together , can I get a gumball machine ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Of course ! Joey would not let you have one ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Joey would not let you have one ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No . When it comes to sweets , he is surprisingly strict .

emotion_cause.span: 3_No . When it comes to sweets , he is surprisingly strict .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , have you figured out a way to tell him you are moving out ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , no , I keep trying , you know ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_I can get out , " Joey , I have too ... " but then I lose my nerve and I always finish with , " ... go to the bathroom . "

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I can get out , " Joey , I have too ... " but then I lose my nerve and I always finish with , " ... go to the bathroom . "

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: He may think I am sick .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know , I really have to tell Rachel , but I ... We just have to get it over with !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know , the next time we see them we are just gonna tell them .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , so that is this is gonna work now ? You are just gonna order me around all the time ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey man , you feeling any better ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Joey , we have something to tell you .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh my God ! You are pregnant !
